news.title: ExxonMobil (XOM) Stock Looks Reasonable On Earnings But Stretched After 180% Run
news.description: ExxonMobil Holdings has enjoyed a strong run over the past few years, yet the stock still screens as attractively priced on broad valuation checks. news.title: India Expands Strategic Oil Reserves With New ONGC Storage Plan
news.description: India is expanding its strategic petroleum reserves through a new ONGC-led storage project while pursuing additional capacity and international crude storage partnerships to strengthen energy security.

news.title: World's Hottest Index Ends Week Down 7.6% Amid AI Jitters
news.description: The world's hottest index finished the week down 7.6% amid artificial-intelligence jitters. South Korea's KOSPI is a hostage to its two biggest constituents—SK Hynix and Samsung. The memory-chip titans finished the week down 10.

news.title: US Stock Market Today: S&P 500 Futures Edge Higher On Persistent Higher Yield Concerns
news.description: The Morning Bull - US Market Morning Update Friday, Jul, 10 2026 US stock futures are pointing slightly higher this morning, with S&P 500 contracts up about 0.2%, as investors weigh stubbornly high bond yields and softer signs from consumer borrowing. The US 10 year Treasury yield is holding near 4.

news.title: Nasdaq Futures Fall as Tech Rally Fades, Market Rotates Out of AI
news.description: The artificial-intelligence rally looked set to fizzle out on Friday as investors opted to lock in some profit following a session of gains for tech.  Nasdaq 100 futures fell 0.4%.  Dow Jones Industrial Average futures ticked up 38 points, or 0.1%.
